# Embedded Profile Flags

Specify copyright-protection flag options,

## Constants

- **cmEmbeddedProfile**: 0 is not embedded profile, 1 is embedded profile
- **cmEmbeddedUse**: 0 is to use anywhere, 1 is to use as embedded profile only

items.description: 0 is not embedded profile, 1 is embedded profile

items.description: 0 is to use anywhere, 1 is to use as embedded profile only
